title: AQUARIUS Y2000 2.5x2.5x2.5cm Small Camcorder Recorder Multifunctional Mini Camera Built In Rechargeable Battery Black
features: MULTI FUNCTION : This super mini high definition camera is equipped with various practical functions integrating digital photography, video recorder function, stable and outstanding quality.

POWERFUL BATTERY LIFE : Supports up to 32GB memory card (not include), fully charged, can work about two or three hours, it will bring you the new and memorable experiences of use and is the indispensable tool for you.
LASTING RECORD : The HD mini camera could be recharged by DC-5V charger while working and continue taking videos, the happy time can not be interrupted.
EASY TO USE : Just insert memory card and start recording. You can put the body camera in the corner of home, office, warehouse, store, backyard, garden.
SUPER SMALL EASY TO HIDE : The camera is a tiny so you can easily hide it without being noticed. High definition for clear and vivid image.
description: Key Features :- High quality polycarbonate. Record by one-touch. It can be also used as a webcam. Up to 32GB storage via micro SD card (not included). Built-in rechargeable battery. Picture Mode: JPG. Video format:AVI. Picture Resolution: 1280x720. Video Resolution: 640x480. Data Transfer Interface: Mini 8pin USB. Specifications :- Brand : Aquarius Package Dimensions : 2.5x2.5x2.8cm Product Material : Polycarbonate. Colour : Black Package Contents : 1x Aquarius Y2000 Mini Camera Camcorder
